jd_text: Regional Sales Director - Middle East & Africa Graphics Solutions | Broadcast & Sports Technology Location: Dubai (with flexibility across the region) The Role We’re looking for a senior sales leader to own and grow the Middle East & Africa region for a market-leading broadcast graphics solutions portfolio, focused on news and sports production. This is a strategic, hands-on role where you’ll define the go-to-market approach, grow market share, and build long-term relationships with broadcasters, sports networks, production companies, and key partners across the region. What You’ll Be Doing Own and execute the regional sales strategy for graphics solutions across MEA Drive new business growth while expanding existing broadcast and sports accounts Build and manage a strong partner ecosystem, including systems integrators and channel partners Lead the full sales cycle: prospecting, solution positioning, negotiation, and close Work closely with product, marketing, and technical teams to align customer needs with solutions Stay on top of market trends, competitor activity, and evolving broadcast workflows Deliver compelling presentations, demos, and proposals to senior stakeholders Maintain accurate forecasts, pipelines, and reporting for regional performance What We’re Looking For Proven success in senior sales or regional leadership roles within broadcast technology or media Strong experience selling graphics solutions into news and sports environments Well-established network across the MEA broadcast ecosystem (customers and SIs) Deep understanding of modern broadcast workflows, including IP, cloud, and subscription models Strategic mindset with a hands-on, results-driven approach Excellent communication and negotiation skills Fluent English; Arabic Willingness to travel regionally and occasionally internationally Why This Role Own a high-impact region with significant growth potential Work with industry-leading graphics technology used by top-tier broadcasters Senior, visible role with real influence over regional strategy Opportunity to shape long-term customer and partner relationships
